title: James Loudspeaker Outdoor Tower Series
bodyHtml:
Outdoor, High-Output Tower Systems

James Loudspeaker Outdoor Tower Series speakers are designed to deliver concert-level performance outdoors.

These freestanding outdoor speakers are constructed of aircraft-grade aluminum and powder coated to a fine finish by our skilled craftsmen at the James Loudspeaker full-service facility in Minden, Nevada. Each exquisite model features proprietary drivers and the sonic refinement that integrators and end-users have come to expect from James Loudspeaker products.

A performance-driven design based on output and clarity, Outdoor Tower speakers feature a titanium quad tweeter array and dual aluminum woofers. Each model includes either an internal or external mount for soft landscaping or hardscape surfaces. The cabinets may be built to custom height up to 96” and with 10 standard finishes and infinite custom options, James Loudspeaker Outdoor Tower speakers can uniquely match any environment.

‍

‍

‍

James Loudspeaker OT66Q

A high-performance tower speaker designed to deliver concert-level performance outdoors. The OT66Q features a titanium quad array tweeter and dual aluminum 6.5” woofers for wide dispersion and crisp fidelity. As a result of their robust engineering and design, the OT66Q Outdoor Tower speakers can effortlessly deliver high SPL playback over extended periods of time. The OT66Q is the smallest form factor of the Outdoor Tower models currently offered.

Any Outdoor Tower speaker can be installed using our internal mount (a beautifully hidden mounting solution for permanent installation into hardscape), or external mount (a wider mounting plate, best suited for permanent landscape installations, or for moveable hardscape installations). For simplified installation and configuration, James Loudspeaker offers optional custom wiring harnesses. The speaker also has access through the front grille for easy in-field servicing.

This model includes the OT-BRK-EM, external mount for use on flat surfaces, landscape areas and burial applications. For a smaller footrprint when the speaker will be fastened to a hardscape, please order the optional internal mount, OT-BRK-IM. This option requires fastening to the surface.

Each OT66Q Outdoor Tower may be ordered in low impedance or 70V configurations. Can be built to custom height, up to 96” (32” minimum). Available in 16 standard finishes or infinite custom finishes options.

James Loudspeaker OT88Q

A high-performance tower speaker designed to deliver concert-level performance outdoors. The OT88Q features a titanium quad array tweeter for wide dispersion and crisp fidelity. It includes dual 6.5” woofers for detailed midrange and its sealed bass enclosure with dual 8” subwoofers is bi-amped for a smooth and powerful bass response. The OT88Q's robust engineering and design allow the James Loudspeaker Outdoor Tower speakers to effortlessly deliver high SPL playback over extended periods of time.

The OT88Q is a bi-amplifiered design so 2 channels of amplification are required for every speaker.  Bi-amplification allows for more power delivery and maximum output capabilities.

Any Outdoor Tower speaker can be installed using our internal mount (a beautifully hidden mounting solution for permanent installation into hardscape), or external mount (a wider mounting plate, best suited for permanent landscape installations, or for moveable hardscape installations). For simplified installation and configuration, James Loudspeaker offers optional custom wiring harnesses. The speaker also has access through the front grille for easy in-field servicing.

This model includes the OT-BRK-EM, external mount for use on flat surfaces, landscape areas and burial applications. For a smaller footrprint when the speaker will be fastened to a hardscape, please order the optional internal mount, OT-BRK-IM. This option requires fastening to the surface.

Each OT88Q Outdoor Tower may be ordered in low impedance or 70V configurations. Can be built to custom height, up to 96” (50” minimum). Available in 16 standard finishes or infinite custom finishes options.

‍

‍

James Loudspeaker OT84-4

A high-performance tower speaker designed to deliver concert-level performance outdoors. The OT84-4 features a 6.5" coaxial midrange with a 1" aluminum dome tweeter, and an 8" woofer with an 8" passive radiator for outstanding bass performance down to 35 Hz.  All seemlessly integrated into a full-range design with a precision multi-elment passive network. Their robust engineering and design allow the James Loudspeaker Outdoor Tower speakers to effortlessly deliver high SPL playback over extended periods of time.

Any Outdoor Tower speaker can be installed using our internal mount (a beautifully hidden mounting solution for permanent installation into hardscape), or external mount (a wider mounting plate, best suited for permanent landscape installations, or for moveable hardscape installations). For simplified installation and configuration, James Loudspeaker offers optional custom wiring harnesses. The speaker also has access through the front grille for easy in-field servicing.

This model includes the OT-BRK-EM, external mount for use on flat surfaces, landscape areas and burial applications. For a smaller footrprint when the speaker will be fastened to a hardscape, please order the optional internal mount, OT-BRK-IM. This option requires fastening to the surface.

Can be built to custom height, up to 96” (32” minimum). Available in 16 standard finishes or infinite custom finishes options.
